revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:板倉町の建築物]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q47481161)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[群馬県]][[板倉町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:いたくらまち}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|いたくらまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:板倉町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:板倉町の建築物|version=66873960}}
[[ja:Category:板倉町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Raiden Shrine (Itakura, Gunma)]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]

Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
